all|all.text: I'm not going to repeat what he said, but UFC fighter Hokit is a despicable piece of shit. The sponsors, Monster energy drink, Bud Lite, Dodge Ram, and Jose Cuervo have not said a word. I say boycott them.

I'm not going to repeat what he said, but UFC fighter Hokit is a despicable piece of shit. The sponsors, Monster energy drink, Bud Lite, Dodge Ram, and Jose Cuervo have not said a word. I say boycott them.

Canada is the New York of North America🤡

"Fast as gas" charging.

Pull your EV up to the "pump." Plug in. Go into the "gas" station to buy a sparkling water and pack of gum. Come out, unplug, and drive off at 85% charge.

Fast as gas.
in light of recent controversies regarding the monster energy drink brand, i would like to issue a retraction:
coca cola polar bear design by deepsnakebites on twitter

That guy from Mythical Kitchen who looks like Benny Johnson says that Dr Pepper tastes exactly like root beer mixed with Coke and I have no idea how someone ended up with an opinion so completely detached from reality
guys I'm quitting soda and weed and nicotine and becoming a health goddess
My stomach after eating a well balanced breakfast of Pepsi, vape, and gabapentin
had one (1) prebiotic soda and three (3) vegan cookies last night and am having ass blowing issues today which I am not used to bc I have the best lower digestive system ever!!!!
his girlfriend is drinking sparkling water
baskin robbins is better than dr pepper because dr pepper has 23 flavors and baskin robbins has 31 flavors and 31 flavors is more flavors than 23 flavors. thank you.
i still have dreams about reinstalling sometimes. quitting destiny was harder than quitting soda, weed, and ketamine combined
I'm in denial about not liking this new flavor of dr pepper I bought a whole case of and I'm trying to emotionally wrestle with that.

sugar|all.text: His wife has them both on some low carb low sugar diet but Bob drinks wine and likes pastries

The Chocolate Chip option was somewhat of a cheat. By using nearly the exact same recipe as their regular cookie dough, but with fewer chocolate chips and added sugar, they reduced the overall fat content of each serving. They were a bit cakey and very sweet but otherwise not TOO different

(belated) day 13: fast forward

a man might grow old(er) but his passion for indulging in a silly little drink with way too much sugar persists🧋

#junelezen2026 | #gposers | #elezen | #vergagpose
Anyone wants to tell him that gluconeogenesis is what happens when you cut out sugar and carbs?
in a stunning turn of events, leftover mcdonalds and pink sugar free red bull for lunch made my stomach hurt

I hate gay ppl wdym you only have no sugar sodas at the function…

I want FULL SUGAR soda
they should make a hard candy w no sugar and it isnt sweet
This bat is headed for the belfry. Still feeling off and tired from my low sugar. Sleep well lovelies!!! 🖤🦇

Some refreshing lime juice or lemonade with no added sugar. 😋

(no specific brand; this is just the image I happened to have on hand)

Great question! Our #1 use for Cheerios is foraging for our piggies. As a low sugar small snack, they are perfect for sprinkling in piles of hay for the pigs to root around for. 
Some of our goats, sheep, and birds love them, too! 
Link to our Amazon to send directly to us: 
a.co/4VXKis0
Don’t eat those sugar free gummies, your stomach with thank you for it later 😭

I need to work on some better material but my brains all fuzzy as fuck. not only do i gotta go sober but i gotta cut out sugar like i gotta start cooking beans and rice like a mother fucker, i actually have to pay attention to health priorities

“Bananas have too much sugar”
Shut up stfuuuuuuu you’ll be eating bananas off the tree growing from my grave in your banana smoothies to curb sweet cravings you liars
It’s actually pretty great to be without romantic interest in someone, like I’ve cut out sugar or something

finally got my sugar free red bull and had enough leftover scrounged change to also get a carton of butterscotch ripple ice cream

let's see if drinking a red bull and smoking weed at 6:40 pm leads to me cleaning the house more, or just eating a lot of ice cream
